message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should be in the centre
The restaurant should serve vietnamese food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 18:45 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:45 and should leave on saturday
The train should go to bishops stortford and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
